arts.ttl: Barcelona Predicted Lineup vs. Borussia Dortmund: UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Barcelona will visit Borussia Dortmund in a battle between two teams in the direct qualification places in the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Barcelona looking for a left-back as Alphonso Davies option fades
arts.sum: FC Barcelona is looking for a new left-back, but it likely won’t be Alphonso Davies as previously rumored. In the future, Barcelona will need to look at how their young players are developing and may be forced to spend money to find a solution at this position.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona in the Champions League, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups and score prediction.

arts.ttl: “He is unique” – Jose Mourinho calls on former club Real Madrid to sign Barcelona target
arts.sum: On Wednesday, Jose Mourinho will be re-united with Spanish opposition as his Fenerbahce side prepare to take on Athletic Club in the Europa League. The former Real Madrid manager will be eyeing up a win in that one, and it promises to be a remarkable spectacle as it is taking place in Istanbul. 24 hours […] The post “He is unique” – Jose Mourinho calls on former club Real Madrid to sign Barcelona target appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: 5 reasons Borussia Dortmund will beat Barcelona in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: That record extends to European competition and includes wins against Paris Saint-Germain (1-0) and Atlético Madrid (4-2) on the way to last season's Champions League final. Summer signing Serhou Guirassy has hit the ground running in BVB colours, equalling Gittens’ tally of four goals in the Champions League in addition to his six in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Barcelona could land key transfer target for just €2 million in January
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona could secure the signature of a long-standing transfer target for a cut-price fee during the January transfer window. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards…

arts.ttl: Revealed: Barcelona could lose £51m summer signing for FREE in January if they can't raise the funds to keep him - having only registered the star for half of the season when he joined
arts.sum: The club continue to have financial issues off the field and are in a race against time to raise funds or risk losing the midfield star for nothing when the winter window opens in a matter of weeks time.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Paper-Thin Borussia Dortmund Host Barcelona
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are tied with them on points at 12 apiece in the UCL this season and both teams will be looking to guarantee knock-out football with a win. Borussia Dortmund’s defense issues now come face-to-face with Barcelona and a familiar Robert Lewandowski.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund will trust defender as ‘Lamine Yamal stopper’ vs Barcelona

arts.ttl: Barcelona could welcome two players back for Leganés clash
